	Completed: installed Node 12-compatible dependencies, validated the audit module, and verified the build script.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Completed: launched the app on http://localhost:3000 from the workspace task.

	Completed: updated README.md, kept project information current, and removed HTML comments from this file.

- Keep communication concise and focused.
